name: Okta: Inbound User and Group Synchronization
description: Lists all inbound user and group synchronization relationships to Okta, including password synchronization across Org2Org setups.
query:
MATCH path = (source)-[:Okta_UserSync|Okta_MembershipSync|Okta_PasswordSync]->(target)
WHERE target:Okta_User OR target:Okta_Group
RETURN path
LIMIT 1000
